purpose: Adopt selected-pair public elevation provenance and compute a DEM-derived terrain horizon mask for the two selected-pair stations only.

dataset.distribution: Cloud Optimized GeoTIFFs in the AWS Open Data copernicus-dem-30m bucket
dataset.distributionRelease: Copernicus DEM 2021 release per AWS Open Data registry
dataset.verticalDatum: EGM2008 / EPSG:3855 per Copernicus Data Space DGED specification
dataset.rasterType: RasterPixelIsPoint for DGED according to Copernicus Data Space; GeoTIFF key observed as GTRasterTypeGeoKey=2
dataset.licenseStatus: GLO-30 Public and GLO-90 are available on a free basis for the general public under the Copernicus DEM license terms
dataset.citation: Copernicus Digital Elevation Model (DEM) accessed on 2026-06-12 from https://registry.opendata.aws/copernicus-dem/ and the copernicus-dem-30m S3 bucket.
dataset.requiredNoticeSummary: When communicating or distributing Copernicus WorldDEM-30 data, use the source notice requested by Copernicus Data Space. This artifact records sampled values only and does not redistribute raw tiles.

algorithm.name: radial-nearest-cell-horizon-v1
algorithm.terrainMaskRule: For each azimuth, sample Copernicus GLO-30 nearest cells every radialStepMeters out to radiusMeters, compute atan2(sampleElevationM - adoptedStationElevationM, distanceMeters), keep the maximum positive horizon angle, then set terrainMaskDeg to ceil(max positive horizon angle) constrained to 0..90.
algorithm.curvatureAndRefraction: Not applied. This selected-pair mask is a local terrain-screening proxy over 5 km, not a surveyed RF horizon.

selectedPairScope: Only cht-yangmingshan and sansa-hartebeesthoek were sampled. Full 69-row registry terrain-mask generation remains out of scope for this slice.

stationCoordinate.authorityBoundary: Representative Yangmingshan-region coordinate; not proven as an official facility coordinate.

stations.adoptedElevationPolicy: No operator-stated altitude is retained for the representative CHT coordinate; adopt the retained Copernicus GLO-30 sample for this selected-pair fixture row.

stationCoordinate.authorityBoundary: Operator-web coordinate, compatible with SANSA's published 25 deg 53 South, 27 deg 42 East site disclosure.

stations.adoptedElevationPolicy: Operator-stated altitude wins for station altitude; Copernicus GLO-30 remains the public DEM terrain surface used for horizon comparison.

supports: selected-pair public DEM-derived terrain mask for runtime thresholding
Copernicus GLO-30 tile/cell/datum traceability for selected-pair station elevation and surrounding terrain samples
CHT representative-coordinate elevation adopted from public DEM because no operator-stated altitude is retained
SANSA station elevation remains operator-stated while surrounding terrain uses public DEM
doesNotSupport: packet, RF, active route, or acceptance claims
